No rooms free for those dates

The bay books up fast in summer. Try a different window, or leave your dates and we'll message you the moment a room opens.

RRoyal Hotel

A contemporary grand hotel in the heart of Cape Town. City-view rooms and suites, a rooftop pool and spa, and a calmer way to stay in the city.
